postReview.title: Italy 1-3 France: Rabiot, Digne combine to clinch top spot
postReview.description: Kylian Mbappe's absence was not felt by France as they claimed a 3-1 win over Italy to round off their Nations League Group A2 campaign.

preReview.title: Donnarumma: France can still hurt Italy without Mbappe
preReview.description: Kylian Mbappe will not feature for France against Italy, but Gianluigi Donnarumma pointed out the other threats posed by the visitors.
